mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t1.ID_) FROM act_ru_task t1 INNER JOIN act_ru_execution t2 ON t1.PROC_INST_ID_ = t2.PROC_INST_ID_ LEFT JOIN act_ru_identitylink t3 ON t3.TASK_ID_ = t1.ID_ WHERE t2.BUSINESS_KEY_ IS NOT NULL
AND t1.TENANT_ID_ = #{params.appSn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND t2.NAME_ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%')
AND (t1.ASSIGNEE_ = #{params.userCode} OR t3.USER_ID_ = #{params.userCode} OR t3.GROUP_ID_ IN ( SELECT g.GROUP_ID_ FROM act_id_membership g WHERE g.USER_ID_ = #{params.userCode}))

SELECT DISTINCT t1.ID_, t1.NAME_, t1.CREATE_TIME_, t1.ASSIGNEE_, t1.TASK_DEF_KEY_, t1.CATEGORY_, t2.BUSINESS_KEY_, t2.PROC_INST_ID_, t2.PARENT_ID_, t2.PROC_DEF_ID_, t2.NAME_ AS FORM_NAME_, t2.START_TIME_, t2.START_USER_ID_ FROM act_ru_task t1 INNER JOIN act_ru_execution t2 ON t1.PROC_INST_ID_ = t2.PROC_INST_ID_ LEFT JOIN act_ru_identitylink t3 ON t3.TASK_ID_ = t1.ID_ WHERE t2.BUSINESS_KEY_ IS NOT NULL
AND t1.TENANT_ID_ = #{params.appSn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND t2.NAME_ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%')
AND (t1.ASSIGNEE_ = #{params.userCode} OR t3.USER_ID_ = #{params.userCode} OR t3.GROUP_ID_ IN ( SELECT g.GROUP_ID_ FROM act_id_membership g WHERE g.USER_ID_ = #{params.userCode}))
ORDER BY t1.CREATE_TIME_ ASC

SELECT DISTINCT t1.ID_, t1.NAME_, t1.ASSIGNEE_, t1.TASK_DEF_KEY_, t1.START_TIME_ AS CREATE_TIME_, t1.END_TIME_ AS TASK_END_TIME_, t2.BUSINESS_KEY_, t2.PROC_INST_ID_, t2.PROC_DEF_ID_, t2.NAME_ AS FORM_NAME_, t2.START_TIME_, t2.END_TIME_, t2.START_USER_ID_ FROM act_hi_taskinst t1 INNER JOIN act_hi_procinst t2 ON t1.PROC_INST_ID_ = t2.PROC_INST_ID_ LEFT JOIN act_hi_identitylink t3 ON t3.TASK_ID_ = t1.ID_ WHERE t2.BUSINESS_KEY_ IS NOT NULL
AND t1.TENANT_ID_ = #{params.appSn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND t2.NAME_ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%')
AND (t1.ASSIGNEE_ = #{params.userCode} OR ((t1.ASSIGNEE_ IS NULL OR t1.ASSIGNEE_ = '') AND (t3.USER_ID_ = #{params.userCode} OR t3.GROUP_ID_ IN ( SELECT g.GROUP_ID_ FROM act_id_membership g WHERE g.USER_ID_ = #{params.userCode}))))
ORDER BY t1.START_TIME_ DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE act_hi_taskinst SET ASSIGNEE_ = #{assignee, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ID_ = #{taskId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
